Name: Cutting the Sales Cycle by 40%
Challenge: CAC was 3× the industry benchmark and the sales cycle averaged 90 days, burning runway and slowing growth.
Solution: Repositioned the ICP to mid-market ops teams, rebuilt the outbound sequence around a pain-first narrative, and introduced a product-led trial path to reduce time-to-value.

Name: 22-Point On-Time Delivery Turnaround
Challenge: A 15% late-delivery rate was generating customer churn and driver overtime costs exceeding £200k annually.
Solution: Full route optimisation audit, new dispatcher SOP, and integration of a lightweight routing tool — no infrastructure overhaul required.

Name: 6 Hours of Admin Saved Per Fee-Earner Weekly
Challenge: Fee-earners were losing approximately 8 billable hours per week to document admin, drafting, and internal reporting.
Solution: Workflow audit identified three high-volume document types. Ran a 6-week AI-assisted drafting pilot across two practice groups, with training and quality controls built in.
ROI Label: Admin hours saved per fee-earner weekly

Name: Series A Raise Closed at Target Valuation
Challenge: Founder had a strong product but a financial model that didn't hold up to investor scrutiny, and a narrative that buried the unit economics.
Solution: Rebuilt the 5-year model from first principles, rewrote the investor narrative section of the deck, and ran three rounds of mock Q&A with the founding team before roadshow.
